{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Coppers
| introduced = cradle-09-bloodline
}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Coppers]] are a rank or classification of person being robbed by [[Irons]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c15">''Bloodline'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Coppers]] are a group located at [[Mount Samara]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c17">''Bloodline'', chapter 17</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
[[Category:Titles]]
